center.name: 大奴湖
center.summary: 大奴湖是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括美洲麻鳽，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It breeds in southern Canada as far north as British Columbia, the Great Slave Lake and Hudson Bay, and in much of the United States and possibly central Mexico

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It breeds in southern Canada as far north as British Columbia, the Great Slave Lake and Hudson Bay, and in much of the United States and possibly central Mexico
